name: bun-browser
description: Bun Core compiled to WebAssembly for browsers, driven by a host JS engine via the JSI bridge.

scripts.build:wasm: cd ../.. && /tmp/zig-dl/bootstrap-aarch64-linux-musl/zig build --build-file build-wasm-smoke.zig build-wasm && cp zig-out/packages/bun-browser/bun-core.wasm packages/bun-browser/bun-core.wasm
scripts.build:wasm:release: cd ../.. && /tmp/zig-dl/bootstrap-aarch64-linux-musl/zig build --build-file build-wasm-smoke.zig build-wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseFast && cp zig-out/packages/bun-browser/bun-core.wasm packages/bun-browser/bun-core.wasm
scripts.build:wasm:opt: cd ../.. && /tmp/zig-dl/bootstrap-aarch64-linux-musl/zig build --build-file build-wasm-smoke.zig build-wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseFast && wasm-opt -O3 --enable-bulk-memory --strip-debug --strip-producers -o packages/bun-browser/bun-core.wasm zig-out/packages/bun-browser/bun-core.wasm
scripts.demo:dev: cp -n bun-core.wasm demo/public/bun-core.wasm 2>/dev/null || true && cd demo && vite
scripts.demo:build: cp bun-core.wasm demo/public/bun-core.wasm && cd demo && vite build
